ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer (city, state, zip) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the customer (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., voice, data, internet) */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., postpaid, prepaid) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_price" REAL /* Price of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_services" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service subscribed */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date of subscription */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "bill_date" TEXT /* Date of the bill */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the bill */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date of the complaint */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "complaint_status" TEXT /* Status of the complaint (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_reps" (
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_assignments" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint */,
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assigned representative */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date of resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id", "rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date of resolution */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resolutions_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churn_predictions" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "churn_probability" REAL /* Probability of churn */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of prediction */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Model used for prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "prediction_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Personalized recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date of recommendation */,
  "recommendation_model" TEXT /* Model used for recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "recommendation_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., customer service representative, data analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of login */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of login */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time of logout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of interaction */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time of interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email, chat) */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel of interaction (e.g., phone, email, chat platform) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_codes" (
  "area_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area code */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Area code (e.g., 408, 415) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City corresponding to the area code */,
  "state" TEXT /* State corresponding to the area code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_codes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "international_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan (e.g., international plan yes/no) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "countries_covered" TEXT /* Countries covered by the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_international_plans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_mail_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan (e.g., voice mail plan yes/no) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "voice_mail_inbox_size" INTEGER /* Size of the voice mail inbox */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_mail_plans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "data_usage_date" TEXT /* Date of data usage */,
  "data_used" INTEGER /* Amount of data used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "data_usage_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_details" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date of the call */,
  "call_time" TEXT /* Time of the call */,
  "call_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the call */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of the call (e.g., incoming, outgoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "call_date", "call_time")
)

CREATE TABLE "sms_details" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "sms_date" TEXT /* Date of the SMS */,
  "sms_time" TEXT /* Time of the SMS */,
  "sms_text" TEXT /* Text of the SMS */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "sms_date", "sms_time")
)
